name: Galtus Previa
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing random lower-class clothing. His only equipment is a broken shield.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: enterprising, ill-prepared

Role: Farmer who independently searched for gems.

Home Location Information: Formerly lived outside the caverns of Nonwyll. Last known location was Nonwyll Cavern.

Equipment and Abilities: Carried a broken shield and wore lower-class clothing. No evidence of formal combat training or specialized equipment.

Personality – Unprotected Prospector: Galtus Previa entered Nonwyll Cavern in search of gems without the protection or preparation typical of trained adventurers. Information provided by the Fighters Guild indicates he was acting independently at the request of his family rather than as part of an organized expedition.

Fate: Galtus Previa was found dead in the northeastern chamber of the Nonwyll Chamber of the Titans. His body was intact despite the presence of nearby trolls, and there were no clear signs of a struggle or scavenging. The circumstances of his death were noted as unusual by those who investigated the scene.
author: Bethesda
